response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video duration. 2. Observed a static image throughout. 3. Listened to the audio, which consists of instrumental music only. 4. Confirmed no vocal music is present.
response.global_summary: A static promotional image for a concert, accompanied by instrumental music. There is no vocal performance in this clip.

scenes.description: A static image featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis with text announcing the end of the sneak peek. Instrumental background music plays throughout, with no vocals.
